headline: Ken Paxton 🔥🍑 BOOTS Cornyn 🧓💼 in Texas Senate SLAY 🔪
text: Texas AG Ken Paxton 🔥👨‍⚖️ 62 and SLAYING 😈 just ROUTED 23-year vet John Cornyn 🧓🗳️ in the GOP runoff primary 💥🏛️! Cornyn, once Senate GOP whip 💼😴 got YEETED after 12 years in leadership 🍆📉 while Paxton danced on his grave with Trump’s blessing 🍊👑. This $9-to-1 underdog spend SPANKED the establishment like it owed him money 🤑💦 and set the record for most EXPENSIVE Senate primary in US history 💸🔥! Now it’s Paxton vs Dem state rep James Talarico 🗣️🌈 in November’s cage match 🥊🗳️ for the Senate seat that hasn’t gone blue since 1988 🐘🟦. Dems are licking their chops 🍭😋 hoping scandals make Paxton the WEAK LINK to flip Texas and grab Senate control during Trump’s last two years 🍊⌛. Meanwhile Paxton already went full attack-ad mode calling Talarico a lefty extremist 🟥🤡 while polls showed a nail-biter race 📊😰. Trump’s endorsement dropped last minute like a mic 🎤💥 after base thirst for firebrand populists over ‘too-old, too-timid’ Cornyn 🧓😴. Same week lightning struck twice when Louisiana’s Bill Cassidy got BOOTED too ⚡🐊 proving MAGA base bigger than the man himself. Down-ballot Chip Roy got ROYALLY dethroned by Mayes Middleton while Trump’s picks Alex Mealer and Carlos De La Cruz bodied Abbott’s favorites in House districts 🏠🔥. On Dem side Christian Menefee, 38, dethroned 78-year-old Al Green in Houston 18th 🗳️👴 while Colin Allred smacked Julie Johnson near Dallas 🥊🤠. Dems dodged a bullet when sheriff Johnny Garcia crushed sex-therapist Maureen Galindo’s Zionist-camp drama in the 35th 🛡️😬. Crypto cash tried to axe Green but Menefee survived the $6M Fairshake hit 💰💥. Paxton victory smells like blood in the water for Dems but Texas still red AF 🔴 so Talarico’s gotta hustle or get COOKED come November 🍳🗳️!
